caption: A man wearing a light blue patterned traditional garment and a dark blue cap with an embroidered design stands behind a wooden podium, speaking into a microphone. He is viewed from the side, facing right, with a blurred green background behind him. A logo for "plustv" is visible in the upper left corner of the video feed. A purple banner across the middle of the screen reads "PLUS POLITICS" followed by a larger headline that states "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Below this, a white bar displays "FOLLOW US" alongside social media icons and the handle "PLUSTVAFRICA". At the bottom of the frame, a banner indicates "WATCH ON" with "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position behind the podium, with only slight movements as he speaks, while the on-screen graphics remain static.
